item.title: best ways to run your website for less than $6 in 2022
item.dc:creator: admin
item.description:
Here are a few resources to help you promote your project for less than $6 per year If you intend to create a website, you will first require a good and catchy domain name. You can choose the domain name from Namecheap Dreamhost Bluehost Godaddy You may find several domain extensions, including .com, .biz, and.us, on the aforementioned domain registrar, and they cost less than $6. You are free to select any of them as your domain name. Free static site hosting Netlify Vercel Github Pages Render Firebase Hosting Surge Cloudflare pages Free Database Supabase Mongo Atlas Free Backend Netlify…

The post best ways to run your website for less than $6 in 2022 appeared first on Khawar Mehfooz.
item.content:encoded:
Here are a few resources to help you promote your project for less than $6 per year

If you intend to create a website, you will first require a good and catchy domain name. You can choose the domain name from

  • Namecheap
  • Dreamhost
  • Bluehost
  • Godaddy

You may find several domain extensions, including .com, .biz, and.us, on the aforementioned domain registrar, and they cost less than $6. You are free to select any of them as your domain name.

Free static site hosting

  • Netlify
  • Vercel
  • Github Pages
  • Render
  • Firebase Hosting
  • Surge
  • Cloudflare pages

Free Database

  • Supabase
  • Mongo Atlas

Free Backend

  • Netlify Functions
  • Vercal
  • Google Functions

The post best ways to run your website for less than $6 in 2022 appeared first on Khawar Mehfooz.
